title: Add Timezone to the DateTime column
excerpt: We have team members in multiple different timezones so it would be helpful if when specifying a date/time using the datetime column, you could also specify the exact time zone so there’s no confusion on when deadlines a…

posts.author: isaac.pemberton (Isaac Pemberton)
posts.cookedHtml: We have team members in multiple different timezones so it would be helpful if when specifying a date/time using the datetime column, you could also specify the exact time zone so there’s no confusion on when deadlines are.
